stage.name: Demo Stage
stage.description: Learn how to use UpStage for your own cyberformances.

objects.content:
Welcome to UpStage!
This Demo stage is used for demonstrations,
workshops, parties and other activities.
There isn't always anyone here.
Please visit the UpStage website
 (click the logo below)
for info about our current activities.

Feel free to say hello
and leave comments in the chat
>> >> >> >>
